diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Genshin Impact Player Support, how can I help?
[Caller] Hi, could you check my pity counter? I want to know how close I am to the next 5-star.
[Agent] Of course. Your UID?
[Caller] 803990456.
[Agent] Got it. Pulling your pity data for the current character banner. You're at 62 pulls since your last 5-star, which was Hu Tao. Soft pity hasn't kicked in yet — it starts at pull 75.
[Caller] Oh nice, so 13 more pulls until it boosts?
[Agent] Correct, 13 more until soft pity, 28 more until hard pity at 90.
[Caller] Perfect. One more thing — I'm thinking about pulling for the next banner. Can you tell me what 5-stars I've gotten this year?
[Agent] Sure, let me list them. Your 5-stars in 2026 so far are Hu Tao, Xiao, Yelan, and a Standard 5-star Mona. Lifetime spend 145 dollars.
[Caller] Wait, I didn't ask about spend.
[Agent] Sorry, just including it for context. Anything else?
[Caller] Not right now, thanks.
[Agent] Have a great day!
